title: Bullet with Butterfly Wings
album: Mellon Collie and the Infinite Sadness (Remastered)
why_this_song: Bullet with Butterfly Wings by The Smashing Pumpkins (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "despite" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "despite" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rage" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Tell me there's no other one

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Bullet with Butterfly Wings" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Bullet with Butterfly Wings"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Smashing Pumpkins one question about "Bullet with Butterfly Wings", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Smashing Pumpkins sobre "Bullet with Butterfly Wings", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Bullet with Butterfly Wings" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Bullet with Butterfly Wings" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
